markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To get an expert audit of the AI-led Growth YouTube strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Define a Single ICP:** Focus all content on one Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) to build a loyal audience and trigger YouTube's "tranche" algorithm, which rewards consistent viewership.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Adopt a "Title-First" Process:** Reverse the current workflow. Start with a compelling title/thumbnail, then script the hook and CTA to maximize Click-Through Rate (CTR) and 30-second retention.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [**Create a Separate Podcast Channel:** Move conversational podcasts to a dedicated channel. This prevents them from diluting the main channel's focus and failing the algorithm's "tranche" test.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [**Use Competitor Analysis for Topics:** Find video topics by analyzing competitor channels for videos that significantly outperform their channel average (e.g., 5-10x more views).](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inconsistent Content & Audience Confusion

  - [The AI-led Growth channel's varied content (SaaS builds, SEO, GEO) attracts different viewers for each video.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [This inconsistency confuses the algorithm, which optimizes for audience watch time (CTR + retention).](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Result:** Videos fail the "tranche" test. The algorithm shows a new video to the most loyal viewers; if they don't engage, the video is not promoted to a wider audience.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### The Solution: A "Title-First" Production Process

  - [Caleb's process, which grew his channel from 5k subscribers in 15 months to rapid growth in 7, reverses the current workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [**Process Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
    1.  [**Title:** Create a compelling, "mystery box" title that hooks viewers without giving away the ending.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
    2.  [**Thumbnail:** Design the thumbnail to complement the title and maximize CTR.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
    3.  [**Hook:** Script the first 30 seconds word-for-word to immediately confirm the video's topic and set up a content loop (e.g., a challenge).](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
    4.  [**Outline:** Build a skeleton outline for the main content.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
    5.  [**CTA:** Script a word-for-word outro that directs viewers to a specific, relevant video.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This structure ensures high CTR and 30-second retention, signaling to YouTube that the video is valuable.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Platform-Specific Content Strategy

  - [**YouTube:** Best for deep-dive, scripted videos. Caleb's "Young Timmy" ICP is a male interested in AI for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**Shorts/Reels/TikTok:** Requires native content designed for short-form viewing. Repurposing long-form content fails because it's not scripted for the format.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [**Email/Facebook:** Audiences are similar and respond well to posts that perform on either platform.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [Email Caleb to discuss a potential future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [Create a dedicated YouTube channel for "AI-led Growth Podcasts."](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [**Will & Brandon:**](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=2656.0)
      - [Implement the "title-first" process, starting with the next recording.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=2486.0)
      - [Use competitor analysis (videos with 5-10x channel average views) to identify high-potential topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [Define a specific ICP for the main channel (e.g., "Big Tim," a CMO at a Fortune 500 company).](https://fathom.video/share/7mQb_GLaJMnEtzs_nwZWGRbycrVmEUKn?tab=summary&timestamp=2845.0)
